nasb.text: Therefore no one is to act as your judge in regard to food or drink or in respect to a festival or a new moon or a Sabbath day—

esv.text: Therefore let no one pass judgment on you in questions of food and drink, or with regard to a festival or a new moon or a Sabbath.

cnv.text: 所以不要讓人因著飲食、節期、月朔、安息日批評你們，

ccb.text: 所以，不可让人在饮食、节期、朔日或安息日的事上批评你们。

csbs.text: 所以，在吃喝的事上，或在有关节日、月朔或安息日的事上，不要让人评断你们。
